column1: 5am Track Update: Debby is nearing landfall and continues to bring a threat of flooding rain and storm surge through the day today.
Way more rain than what was predicted I think
This was 4am now we have ankle deep water throughout our entire house
so so sorry you're going thru this.
goodness... so sorry! Where do you live?
centre lake!! Sarasota/manatee county
gosh... so sorry!
You're a beast, Dennis! We are SO blessed to have you for our "more than just a meteorologist". Thank you for stayjng up, keeping watch, and caring about us all. ❤

We live in Dixie county and expected this but didn’t expect landfall here again. Do you have an idea of about where this is coming in? Steinhatchee or cedar key? I’ve read both? Thank for you keeping us up to date. We follow you for the weather up here. Frankly you’re the best.
I'm just off of Spillers,I wish we could at least see what's going on outside. I guess we'll see in an hour or two. Good luck 🤞
same to you! We just walked out to see what we could see. Our flag pole took a hit and lots and LOTS of limbs. We are praising Jesus because nothing major. Praying the same for everyone.
Some of you people are just unbelievable. Is this guy your day planner or life coach? Give him a break and use some common sense for god's sake.
I’m over Debby. She needs to hurry up and move on.
Praying for perseverance for you until she pulls away from you. 🙏🛐🛐🙏

You’re sweet. Thank you. I’m just tired of it raining so hard for so long. I love storms but not for this long.😂 We’ve been stuck in most of those heavy bands of rain for the duration of this storm, just ready for it to move on.
Debby has been a PITA.Get on outa here !! Already ! Did just get power back though after 7 hours . Grateful! Madeira Beach here
Same here. I'm in Madeira Beach as well. Power went out at 9:45 and came back on at 5:45. Hot night!
right ? Very sticky🥵
you’re lucky, mine has been out since 7p last night here in Pinellas park 😭
I am so very sorry that you have been and are without power.
Beautifully said. PITA.
Major flooding in Lakewood Ranch now, but the rain & wind has finally calmed down. Didn’t even see this during Ian.
Yep and we have a small roof leak here also. This was alot of rain - way worse than Ian.
it seems like it was much more rain!
yeah it’s been non stop ! Finally hearing a break in the rain

Good morning!
Thank you for keeping us aware.
What are you thoughts for traveling from Hernando to Gainesville this morning? We have a pediatric appointment mid morning.

If it’s urgent, double check that your route’s roads are open. Hwy 75 has exits in Gainesville, but the lower roads will still have to deal with the water, if nearby rivers or rains affect them. Unless it’s urgent, I’d reschedule, if they’re even open.

I just drove to work at the villages hospital from homosassa..not raining too bad..mostly tree debris, few little gusts...the worst was some areas have water standing on road that didn't drain. I expected worse
I live in Gainesville and don’t advise the trip. We are getting pounded now with wind and rain. Unsafe driving conditions.
I’ve heard there’s widespread power outages in Alachua county. And elsewhere. 😩
Sigh.
make sure the clinics are open. Many of the UF clinics are closed
You are the best Denis Phillips! We appreciate you!!! Hope everyone stays safe.
They didn't! Many cars, homes, and boats damaged.
Feels like a never ending storm in Venice

Agree ...here in Myakka it hasn't stopped ...it's been rocking and rolling for 24 hrs now ...and every time I turn around we are in a tornado warning ...Be safe ...hope this will be over soon but I think it's gonna go on all day too ...
I agree! She isn’t stopping.
my daughter is in north port. Prayers for safety 🙏. Stay safe.
yes! This wind is awful 😞 I'm in Lakeland tho
agree
Totally agree with you. Sound asleep and got woke up by a crazy wind gust about 15 min ago here in Bradenton.
I must be having sympathy sleeplessness for you all
We are at Maderia Beach on vacation. A vacation to remember that’s for sure. Big storm. Hope everyone is safe. Been raining for hours and hours here as well
Hillsborough County schools staying open today for teachers?
Just worried about the safety/driving issues
i totally get it. there were floods everywhere when driving in! i hope you stayed safe
I was worried about Chelsea. But she made it OK.
Yep. Off to work we go.
yes off to professional study day!

I can’t believe with all the flooding they think it’s safe! We’re in Hernando. Our super, principals and union presidents had a call yesterday to determine safety for staff. We’re not working. I mean most of us will just work at home— like I’m digitally meeting w my team to plan. But I can’t imagine driving in this. Esp w surges being a problem all day.
Be safe!!
I live in Hernando and work in Hillsborough, definitely a rough drive early this morning.
I imagine so since others are open
she asked about hillsborough
I know. But you said others were open. I didn’t know if you meant school districts. Bc multiple have closed.

Thank you Denis for sticking by us.
Not all super heroes wear capes.
This one wears suspenders!
lol yes! Better choice as in capes just get in the way.
Debby needs to move faster. Can’t sleep with this and then the tornado warnings made it worse
omg I was waking up every 20 minutes last night… and checking Denis Phillips for an update 😂😂😂
Good bye to this storm Debby.
Why is is this bad here in pinellas windy 🌬️ rain 😵‍💫
Thank you for your accurate weather updates! It’s so hard to trust the weather forecast on apps these days.
EXACTLY
The flooding we got all over Pinellas County from a tropical storm is just mind blowing. Even places that don't normally flood. Denis Phillips why was it so bad

Why did he tell us it would be "just like our typical summer rain storm with a different name"? Many people did not prepare as they should have because of this. I think it was very unprofessional on his part! I'll be watching elsewhere next storm we have to face.
In Lake County (between Orlando and Ocala) lots of rain, some hail and power went out an hour ago.
I live in New Port Richey and the amount of rain that is pouring down right now is honestly crazy 👀
same in Weeki Wachee
Good morning Denis Phillips. Thank you for all the updates. Unreal the amount of rain here coastal Hudson
hope all is good with you & Alex. Crazy wind & rain. We are good here!
yes. All ok. Pleased the storm is past. Pleased all good with you😘
Stay tuned for Ernesto.1 week away
Stay safe .prayers for your family
Anyone in Cape Coral? We have friends that arrived there yesterday and haven’t heard from them
I'm nearby in Fort Myers. Sunday it was gray and windy and rainy but not bad at all. I'm sure they are fine.
there is a Cape Coral Resident Cape Coral Resident's Group (Est. Feb., 2016) on FB ….or Cape Coral Forum group..they maybe able to help. Heavy rain event there ..,.
Wind and rain pretty bad here in Branford. Power has been out for about 45 minutes now.
glad y'all are okay up there sis ❤️ Lake Wales had rain and wind. Didn't lose power🙏🙌 it wasn't bad here at all ! Thank God!
thanks sis! Glad it wasn’t bad there! Still very windy here and still raining. Power still out as well, but thankfully we have our generator up and running now 🙏🏼
We are getting the winds an rain in swaunee county.
stay safe!
It seems that slow moving storms drop the most water.
Thanks for being there with us Denis!
Hope everyone stays safe xx
Lots of rain, thunder and lightning here in Lake Wales. Heavy rain band inching closer
Thank you for keeping us updated!!!
Another monsoon rain band coming thru here in Winter Haven, OH SOOO much rain and Debby is in north Florida now.....
Is Bayshore Blvd open?
Good morning Denis.
Woke up to power flickering. Here we go. Just like idelia gonna be in the eastern eye wall for a while. Watching the trees doing the wiggle dance now.
Water is creeping up towards our house. When will the storm surge recede? We are near Bay to bay and Westshore in South Tampa.
Is it even possible to get to 104 6th S street Bradenton from St. Pete, Clearwater airport ?
I think the question is when. My daughter is supposed to be flying into Tampa at noon today and so far his flight is on time for a 9 am takeoff. Only time I've ever wished for a delay.
thank you . Safe travels for your daughter . In my mind our flight would have been cancelled. Nope !
hers is still on time as well
as of last night, the Sunshine Skyway Bridge was closed.
So tired of this system already. Debby is moving so slooooooow
moving at a whopping 10mph right now
Sheesh Debbie & guess who’s loading a Uhaul in the middle of this nasty rain (hard drizzle). 🙄😩. WC area
Gainesville is rocking with wind and rain… power keeps flickering; 5:30am.
Storm surge was bad!
When will the concern for storm surge end around Tarpon Springs/ Holiday Area?
Keep moving Debby, you move like a turtle causing more havoc on the Gulf Coast!!!
She needs to get a move on. We've had too much water
Thank you for you hard
Does anyone no of teachers still go into work in plant city?
Thank you Denis Phillips for all the updates !! We appreciate you

I'm really sorry for all that live there.
We are due to fly over to Charlotte Douglas, then to Orlando on August 10th. I'm now panicking about my flight.
I know Charlotte is inland, but would flights still land due to heavy rains?
I apologize for all the questions, but im a non US and have no idea how these storms work.
We fly with AA, would they reroute us if Charlotte is bad to land?
Thanks
That is 5 days from now. The storm will be long gone. I believe you already asked and had responsesT
yes iv asked numerous times. As a non US, one cannot help but ask whenever there are any changes . I now wish I would have studied geography lol
you should be fine by then keep checking with your airlines to be sure
I wouldn't be panicking over 5 days from now love. It won't still be here
follow Brad Panovich Meteorologist in Charlotte NC. This system could affect the Carolinas for several days since it is supposed to stall. Think you will be good but….
aug 10th. In 5 days? You will be fine. Lol
Thank-you so much
ask the airlines
Seriously? How do you function in life?
Taylor?

No storm surge in Crystal River 🙏🏽
It doesn't look like it's going to affect us this time.
When is this storm supposed to subside?
